summary.en: iFLYTEK's Spark model platform for Chinese-first LLM and multimodal capabilities.
summary.zh: 讯飞星火面向中文场景，提供大模型与多模态能力，支持开发者通过开放平台接入。

title.en: iFLYTEK Spark API Key - Official Access | Get Model Key
title.zh: 讯飞星火 API Key - 官方入口 | Get Model Key

description.en: Get the official iFLYTEK Spark API key entry and docs for developer access.
description.zh: 查看讯飞星火官方 API Key 申请入口与开发文档，快速完成接入。

title.zh: 星火新用户 Token 福利

benefit.en: New users can usually get around 5M tokens; real-name verification is often required (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 新用户通常可获得约 500 万 Token；一般需要完成实名（具体以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: Strong Chinese context handling, making it suitable for content creation and complex multi-turn conversations.
notes.zh: 中文语义理解和上下文把握能力强，适合内容创作与复杂多轮对话。
